scripts.dev: pnpm -C backend dev & pnpm -C frontend dev
scripts.build: pnpm -C backend build && pnpm -C frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm -C backend test && pnpm -C frontend test
scripts.lint: pnpm -C backend lint && pnpm -C frontend lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C backend typecheck && pnpm -C frontend typecheck
